'''manungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:swaddler|swaddler]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-n-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swaddler|swaddler]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| manungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæningith|mæningith]] || [[word:mæningij|mæningij]] || [[word:mæningish|mæningish]] || [[word:mæningi|mæningi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:manununguth|manununguth]] || [[word:manununguj|manununguj]] || [[word:manunungush|manunungush]] || [[word:manunungu|manunungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:manunguth|manunguth]] || [[word:manunguj|manunguj]] || [[word:manungush|manungush]] || [[word:manungu|manungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:manufnguth|manufnguth]] || [[word:manufnguj|manufnguj]] || [[word:manufngush|manufngush]] || [[word:manufnguf|manufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:manunguthu|manunguthu]] || [[word:manunguju|manunguju]] || [[word:manungushu|manungushu]] || [[word:manunguku|manunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:manunguth|manunguth]] || [[word:manunguj|manunguj]] || [[word:manungush|manungush]] || [[word:manungu|manungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:manunguthul|manunguthul]] || [[word:manungujul|manungujul]] || [[word:manungushul|manungushul]] || [[word:manungukul|manungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:manunguthuthu|manunguthuthu]] || [[word:manungujuju|manungujuju]] || [[word:manungushushu|manungushushu]] || [[word:manunguku|manunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:manunguthun|manunguthun]] || [[word:manungujun|manungujun]] || [[word:manungushun|manungushun]] || [[word:manungukun|manungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:manunguthuoro|manunguthuoro]] || [[word:manungujuoro|manungujuoro]] || [[word:manungushuoro|manungushuoro]] || [[word:manungukuoro|manungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
